Compute typed product of two typed stock-flow models (stratification)

Source: R/stockflow.R
sf_typed_product.Rd

Creates all valid pairs of (base_obj, strata_obj) where both map to the same type object, producing a stratified stock-flow model.

Usage

sf_typed_product(tsf1, tsf2, independent_params = FALSE)

Arguments

tsf1

A TypedStockFlow (e.g., base disease model)

tsf2

A TypedStockFlow (e.g., strata model like age groups)

independent_params

If TRUE, keep parameters from both models independent (union) instead of pairing them via type mapping. Default FALSE.

Value

A new StockFlowModel with stratified stocks and flows
